scripts.validate:layout-check: for file in tests/valid/layout_check*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/layout-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-layout-check.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/layout_check*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/layout-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-layout-check.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid layout check fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid layout check fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:completion-gate: for file in tests/valid/completion_gate*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/completion-gate.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-completion-gate.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/completion_gate*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/completion-gate.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-completion-gate.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid completion gate fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid completion gate fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:cross-field: for file in tests/valid/builder_context_package*.json tests/valid/center_anchored_symmetric_reference_ready.json examples/smart-home-connector/builder_context_package.json; do node scripts/validate-package.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid-cross-field/*.json; do if node scripts/validate-package.mjs "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Invalid cross-field package unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid cross-field package correctly failed: $file"; fi; done && npm run validate:reference-paradigm
scripts.validate:builder-context: for file in tests/valid/builder_context_package*.json tests/valid/center_anchored_symmetric_reference_ready.json examples/smart-home-connector/builder_context_package.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/builder-context-package.schema.json -d "$file"; done
scripts.validate:checkpoint: for file in tests/valid/checkpoint*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-checkpoint.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/checkpoint*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file"; then echo "Invalid checkpoint fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid checkpoint fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done && for file in tests/invalid-checkpoint-cross-field/*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/checkpoint.schema.json -r schemas/evidence-record.schema.json -d "$file" && if node scripts/validate-checkpoint.mjs "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Invalid checkpoint cross-field fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid checkpoint cross-field fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:intake-result: for file in tests/valid/intake_result_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/intake-result.schema.json -d "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/intake_result_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/intake-result.schema.json -d "$file"; then echo "Invalid intake result unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid intake result correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:repair-packet: for file in tests/valid/repair_packet*.json examples/smart-home-connector/repair_packet_layout_stability_incident.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-repair-packet.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/repair_packet*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/repair-packet.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-repair-packet.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid repair packet unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid repair packet correctly failed: $file"; fi; done

scripts.validate:cognitive-mode-hint: for file in tests/valid/cognitive_mode_hint_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/cognitive-mode-hint.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-cognitive-mode-hint.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/cognitive_mode_hint_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/cognitive-mode-hint.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-cognitive-mode-hint.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid cognitive mode hint fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid cognitive mode hint correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:elementor-asset-generation: for file in tests/valid/elementor_asset_generation_*.json; do npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/elementor-asset-generation-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-elementor-asset-generation-check.mjs "$file"; done && for file in tests/invalid/elementor_asset_generation_*.json; do if npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/elementor-asset-generation-check.schema.json -d "$file" && node scripts/validate-elementor-asset-generation-check.mjs "$file"; then echo "Invalid Elementor asset generation fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid Elementor asset generation fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
scripts.validate:reference-paradigm: npx --yes ajv-cli@5 validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -s schemas/builder-context-package.schema.json -d tests/valid/center_anchored_symmetric_reference_ready.json && node scripts/validate-package.mjs tests/valid/center_anchored_symmetric_reference_ready.json && for file in tests/invalid/missing_paradigm_lock.json tests/invalid/paradigm_lock_not_locked.json tests/invalid/missing_paradigm_to_structure_map.json tests/invalid/visual_reference_expected_but_unstructured.json tests/invalid/first_batch_vertical_stack_for_symmetric_reference.json tests/invalid/smart_home_connector_wrong_paradigm_regression.json; do if node scripts/validate-package.mjs "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Invalid reference paradigm fixture unexpectedly passed: $file"; exit 1; else echo "Invalid reference paradigm fixture correctly failed: $file"; fi; done
